question: Will RFK Jr. find the cause of Autism before November?
resolution_criteria:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Robert F. Kennedy Jr. publicly announces that he or an affiliated team has identified a definitive cause of autism between April 18 and October 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If RFK Jr. identifies multiple causes, this will qualify for a "Yes" resolution.

The primary resolution source will be announcements from RFK Jr., however a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.
